title: Import data
description: Bring initial products, customers, and suppliers into Puntovivo with reviewable imports isolated to your business.

safety.title: Choose how this file will be used
safety.description: Select a mode before choosing a file. Changing modes clears the current import workflow.

demo.title: Demo data
demo.description: Validate sample or fixture rows without saving any records. The server blocks every commit attempt.

real.title: Real business data
real.description: Create records in this business after preview and explicit confirmation. Use only merchant-owned data.

demoBoundary.title: Preview-only boundary
demoBoundary.description: Demo mode can parse, map, validate, and export issues, but it never creates products, stock, customers, or suppliers.
demoBoundary.previewOnly: Demo preview only. Review and export the results; no row can be saved in this mode.

safety.realConfirmation: I confirm that this file contains real business data and that I have a current restore point.

rollback.title: Create a restore point before importing
rollback.description: In the Desktop app, create an encrypted database backup before committing real data. Keep the final report and import ID so the batch remains traceable in the audit log.
rollback.scopeWarning: There is no one-click batch undo. Restoring the backup replaces the whole local database and also removes every sale, setting, or other change made after that restore point.

upload.title: Choose a source file
upload.description: Upload a UTF-8 CSV or an Excel .xlsx file up to 10 MB and 500 data rows. The file stays in this browser until you preview it.

map.title: Map your columns
map.description: Confirm the detected columns. Product name and SKU are required; every other field can be left unmapped.

preview.title: Review before importing
preview.description: Puntovivo revalidates every row on the server and skips existing or repeated SKUs and barcodes.

issues.out_of_range: Value is outside the allowed range
issues.duplicate_file_sku: SKU is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_sku: SKU already exists in this business
issues.duplicate_file_barcode: Barcode is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_barcode: Barcode already exists in this business
issues.concurrent_duplicate: Another import created this product while this import was running
issues.import_failed: The product could not be imported
issues.stock_failed: The product was imported but opening stock could not be recorded

table.previewLimit: Showing the first 100 of {{count}} rows. The summary and import include every row.

report.title: Import complete
report.rollbackReminder: If you must reverse this batch, stop new activity and restore the encrypted backup created before the import. Restoring also removes every later change.

template.sampleDescription: Replace this row with your product data

fileErrors.file_too_large: The file exceeds the 10 MB limit.
fileErrors.empty_file: The file does not contain data rows.
fileErrors.empty_header: Every source column needs a header.
fileErrors.duplicate_header: Source column headers must be unique.
fileErrors.too_many_rows: Import at most 500 rows at a time.
fileErrors.row_too_wide: A data row contains more values than the header row.
fileErrors.malformed_csv: The CSV contains an unfinished or invalid quoted value.
fileErrors.workbook_empty: The Excel workbook does not contain a worksheet.

toast.previewError: The file could not be validated
toast.importError: The import could not be completed

products.label: Products and stock
products.description: Catalog, prices, costs, and opening stock.

providers.label: Suppliers
providers.description: Supplier profiles, contacts, and city references.

issues.city_not_found: City code was not found in this business
issues.duplicate_file_name: Name is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_name: Name already exists in this business
issues.duplicate_file_tax_id: Tax ID is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_tax_id: Tax ID already exists in this business
issues.duplicate_file_email: Email is repeated in this file
issues.duplicate_existing_email: Email already exists in this business
issues.concurrent_duplicate: Another import created this record while this import was running
issues.import_failed: The record could not be imported

customers.mapDescription: Confirm the detected customer columns. Name is required; every other field can be left unmapped.
customers.previewDescription: Puntovivo validates every customer and skips repeated tax IDs or email addresses.

template.name: Sample customer
template.notes: Replace this row with your customer data

providers.mapDescription: Confirm the detected supplier columns. Name is required; use the city code from your Puntovivo geography catalog when available.
providers.previewDescription: Puntovivo validates every supplier, checks city codes, and skips repeated names, tax IDs, or email addresses.
